channel.title: rat-os/ratos
channel.description: An OS focusing on making klipper more approachable

item.title: RatOS 2.1.0 has been released!
item.description: This release marks the completion of RatOS version 2.1.0. Release notes and upgrade instructions here: https://github.com/Rat-OS/RatOS/releases/tag/v2.1.0
